text: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP) Eligibility Criteria: 1. Age: Applicants must be at least 18 years old. 2. Project Type: Only new projects are eligible; existing units or those already receiving government subsidies are not eligible. 3. Educational Qualification: No minimum education for projects up to ₹10 lakh (manufacturing) or ₹5 lakh (service). Projects exceeding these limits require passing at least VIII standard. 4. Restrictions: Only one person per family can avail of the assistance, and only one project per individual is allowed.

metadata.ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME)

text: PMEGP Benefits and Financial Assistance: 1. Margin Money Subsidy: Ranges from 15% to 35% of the project cost depending on category (General/Special) and location (Urban/Rural). 2. Financial Assistance: Access to bank-linked credit for capital expenditure and working capital. 3. Collateral-Free Loans: Often covered under CGTMSE. 4. Support Services: EDP training and marketing support through exhibitions and workshops.

PMEGP Application Process and Required Documents: Process: 1. Register on the PMEGP e-portal (https://www.kviconline.gov.in). 2. Validate Aadhaar to get User ID. 3. Fill the online form and upload documents. 4. Submission is verified by KVIC/KVIB/DIC and then forwarded to the bank. Required Documents: Aadhaar Card (mandatory), PAN Card, Address Proof, Detailed Project Report (DPR), Educational/Caste certificates, and Rural Area certificate if applicable.
